
cat <<EOF > index.qmd
---
title: "Home"
format: html
---

## Welcome

```{python}
#try:
#    from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
#   spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()
#   df = spark.createDataFrame([(1, "Item A"), (2, "Item B")], ["id", "name"])
#   df.show()
#except ImportError:
#    import pandas as pd
#    df = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1,2], "name": ["Item A", "Item B"]})
#    print(df)
```
